projects.name: hoainho/img2threejs
projects.description: Rebuild the object in a reference image as a code-only, procedural, quality-gated, animation-ready Three.js model. Token-efficient image-to-3D.
projects.description_cn: 将参考图像中的对象重建为纯代码、程序化、质量门控、动画就绪的 Three.js 模型。令牌高效的图像转 3D。

projects.name: tandpfun/wardrobe
projects.description: Your clothes, extracted and organized with gpt-image.
projects.description_cn: 你的衣服，用 gpt-image 提取并组织。

projects.name: pablostanley/yoinks
projects.description: yoink any video from your terminal. no shady ads.
projects.description_cn: yoink 来自您终端的任何视频。没有阴暗的广告。

projects.name: nethical6/conversation-steganography
projects.description: Use LLMs to hide messages inside normal looking conversations
projects.description_cn: 使用 LLM 将消息隐藏在看似正常的对话中

projects.name: v-modal/vmodal_sdk_flutter
projects.description: V- Modal AI: Search anything anywhere SDK Flutter
projects.description_cn: V- Modal AI：随处搜索任何内容 SDK Flutter

projects.name: MIgHTy-alIeN/MEV-Arbitrage-Bot
projects.description: An arbitrage bot is a smart contract connected to an external automation script that controls its operation.
projects.description_cn: 套利机器人是连接到控制其操作的外部自动化脚本的智能合约。

projects.name: Blueturboguy07/cue
projects.description: Open-source macOS AI copilot that floats over your screen, sees/hears your meetings, and stays hidden from screen shares. Cluely alternative, bring-your-own-key.
projects.description_cn: 开源 macOS AI copilot 漂浮在您的屏幕上，查看/听到您的会议，并隐藏在屏幕共享中。巧妙的选择是自带钥匙。

projects.name: Blaizzy/nativ
projects.description: Local AI, native to your Mac. Chat, serve, monitor, and connect MLX models from one macOS app.
projects.description_cn: 本地 AI，原生于您的 Mac。通过一个 macOS 应用程序聊天、服务、监控和连接 MLX 模型。
